ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address used for account login */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "two_factor_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if two-factor authentication is enabled */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the organization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, pending) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions and access levels */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "revoked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was revoked (NULL if not revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the login event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access performed (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address used for the login */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, OS, etc.) used for the login */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geolocation of the user during the login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "two_factor" (
  "two_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the two-factor setup */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if two-factor is enabled */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of two-factor authentication */,
  "secret_key" TEXT /* Secret key for the two-factor method */,
  "recovery_codes" TEXT /* Recovery codes for the two-factor method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("two_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_two_factor_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user on which the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., edit, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested the reset */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the password reset request */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the reset was completed */,
  "token" TEXT /* Reset token sent to the user */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reset token expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_users" (
  "department_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department-user association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the department */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user left the department (NULL if still a member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., login, data access) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., access logs, user activity) */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Contents of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
